# Copilot Instructions

For repository guidance, follow [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md).

## Code reviews

For Copilot code review overviews, do not summarize the code changes. Provide only high-level feedback on code quality, performance, and best practices.

Use [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md) as the primary checklist for what to evaluate in reviews.

For code reviews, apply this review style:

- Be specific and actionable in feedback.
- Explain the "why" behind recommendations, including links to documentation and best practices when appropriate.
- Focus on the code quality and maintainability, not just whether it works.
